goal: support stricter multi-axis singing evaluation: technique, repeatability, transfer, style/communication, health, and independence

rubric_dimensions.name: efficiency_health
rubric_dimensions.description: absence of strain flags, reasonable load tolerance, healthy recovery behavior

rubric_dimensions.name: stability_repeatability
rubric_dimensions.description: can reproduce the target without one-off luck

rubric_dimensions.name: transfer_application
rubric_dimensions.description: can carry the skill into phrase/repertoire/context

rubric_dimensions.name: stylism_communication
rubric_dimensions.description: style-appropriate tone, diction, timing, and emotional intent

rubric_dimensions.name: independence_self_coaching
rubric_dimensions.description: can describe what worked and select a useful next cue

periodization_hooks: load tier influences expected completion tolerance
pressure ladders raise required repeatability only when health gate is clear
transfer drills weigh more heavily from S3 onward
fairness_tuning: use best valid windows for early beginner tasks
cap low-confidence penalties before chronic diagnosis labels
separate performance pressure misses from technical inability where evidence supports it
